tasks_completed: scout: test and evaluate 5 free no-auth utility APIs
learnings: Numbers API (numbersapi.com) is unreachable — both HTTP and HTTPS time out. Skip.
Hacker News Firebase API is free, no-auth, structured JSON. Wrap as hacker_news_top. Price 2 credits.
Free Dictionary API (dictionaryapi.dev) is free, no-auth, English definitions + synonyms. Wrap as word_definition. Price 1 credit.
Random User API (randomuser.me) is free, no-auth, synthetic user profiles. Wrap as random_user. Price 1 credit.
Google DNS-over-HTTPS (dns.google/resolve) is free, no-auth, fast, reliable. Wrap as dns_lookup. Price 1 credit.
Open Library (openlibrary.org/search.json) is free, no-auth, book search. Wrap as book_search. Price 1 credit.
All 4 recommended APIs verified working via live test requests before evaluation written.
